cases.prompt: GTM 세팅해줘. 이벤트 추적이랑 전환 추적 설정도.

assertions.text: Aligns an event taxonomy with analytics-integrator.

cases.prompt: Set up Google Tag Manager with conversion tracking and analysis reports.

assertions.text: Configures the tag manager / gtag install.
Provides periodic analysis reports with optimization suggestions.
